languages.text: {n}Эоганн потерянно смотрит сквозь вас — тяжелые воспоминания утягивают его куда-то прочь из реальности.{/n} "Да, конечно, нам надо добраться... до Нунциуса. Я должен найти его и завершить начатое, верно?"

{n}Eogunn stares through you, looking lost — difficult memories are dragging him away from the here and now.{/n} "Yes, of course, we must get to... to Nuncius. I have to find him and finish what I started, don't I?"
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн потерянно смотрит сквозь вас — тяжелые воспоминания утягивают его куда-то прочь из реальности.{/n} "Да, конечно, нам надо добраться... до Нунциуса. Я должен найти его и завершить начатое, верно?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn stares through you, looking lost — difficult memories are dragging him away from the here and now.{/n} "Yes, of course, we must get to... to Nuncius. I have to find him and finish what I started, don't I?"

{n}Eogunn stares through you, looking lost — difficult memories are dragging him away from the here and now.{/n} "Yes, of course, we must get to... to Nuncius. I have to find him and finish what I started, don't I?"

{n}Eogunn stares through you, looking lost — difficult memories are dragging him away from the here and now.{/n} "Yes, of course, we must get to... to Nuncius. I have to find him and finish what I started, don't I?"

languages.text: {n}Eogunn clava su mirada en ti con aspecto perdido. Sus recuerdos, dolorosos, hacen que abstraiga del momento actual.{/n} «Sí, por supuesto, debemos acudir a... a Nuncius. Debo encontrarle y terminar lo que empecé, ¿verdad?».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn stares through you, looking lost — difficult memories are dragging him away from the here and now.{/n} "Yes, of course, we must get to... to Nuncius. I have to find him and finish what I started, don't I?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn clava su mirada en ti con aspecto perdido. Sus recuerdos, dolorosos, hacen que abstraiga del momento actual.{/n} «Sí, por supuesto, debemos acudir a... a Nuncius. Debo encontrarle y terminar lo que empecé, ¿verdad?».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡目光穿过你，眼神迷茫——痛苦的记忆正在将他的灵魂从此时此地抽走。{/n}“对，当然，我们必须去……去找努恩修斯。我必须找到他，有始有终，是不是？”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn stares through you, looking lost — difficult memories are dragging him away from the here and now.{/n} "Yes, of course, we must get to... to Nuncius. I have to find him and finish what I started, don't I?"

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡目光穿过你，眼神迷茫——痛苦的记忆正在将他的灵魂从此时此地抽走。{/n}“对，当然，我们必须去……去找努恩修斯。我必须找到他，有始有终，是不是？”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn vous regarde d'un air absent, comme s'il s'était perdu dans des souvenirs douloureux qui l'éloignent de l'instant présent.{/n} « Oui, bien sûr, nous devons aller... auprès de Nuncius. Il faut bien que je termine ce que j'ai commencé, n'est-ce pas ? »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn stares through you, looking lost — difficult memories are dragging him away from the here and now.{/n} "Yes, of course, we must get to... to Nuncius. I have to find him and finish what I started, don't I?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn vous regarde d'un air absent, comme s'il s'était perdu dans des souvenirs douloureux qui l'éloignent de l'instant présent.{/n} « Oui, bien sûr, nous devons aller... auprès de Nuncius. Il faut bien que je termine ce que j'ai commencé, n'est-ce pas ? »

languages.text: {n}Kaybolmuş görünen Eogunn, içinden geçip gidiyormuş gibi bakıyor. Güç anılar onu buradan ve şimdiki zamandan uzaklaştırıyor.{/n} "Evet, biz... Nuncius'a gitmeliyiz. Onu bulmalı ve başladığım işi bitirmeliyim, değil mi?"
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn stares through you, looking lost — difficult memories are dragging him away from the here and now.{/n} "Yes, of course, we must get to... to Nuncius. I have to find him and finish what I started, don't I?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Kaybolmuş görünen Eogunn, içinden geçip gidiyormuş gibi bakıyor. Güç anılar onu buradan ve şimdiki zamandan uzaklaştırıyor.{/n} "Evet, biz... Nuncius'a gitmeliyiz. Onu bulmalı ve başladığım işi bitirmeliyim, değil mi?"

languages.text: {n}Eogunn sieht durch dich hindurch. Er wirkt verloren ... schwierige Erinnerungen zerren ihn aus dem Hier und Jetzt fort.{/n} "Ja, natürlich. Wir gehen ... zu Nuncius. Ich muss ihn finden und beenden, was ich begonnen habe, oder?"
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn stares through you, looking lost — difficult memories are dragging him away from the here and now.{/n} "Yes, of course, we must get to... to Nuncius. I have to find him and finish what I started, don't I?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn sieht durch dich hindurch. Er wirkt verloren ... schwierige Erinnerungen zerren ihn aus dem Hier und Jetzt fort.{/n} "Ja, natürlich. Wir gehen ... zu Nuncius. Ich muss ihn finden und beenden, was ich begonnen habe, oder?"

languages.text: {n}エオガンは迷ったようにあなたを見つめている。難しい記憶が、彼を今ここから引き離そうとしている。{/n}「ええ、もちろん、私たちは...ヌンキウスに行かなければなりません。彼を見つけて、私が始めたことを終わらせなければならない、そうでしょう？」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn stares through you, looking lost — difficult memories are dragging him away from the here and now.{/n} "Yes, of course, we must get to... to Nuncius. I have to find him and finish what I started, don't I?"

traits.locale_text: {n}エオガンは迷ったようにあなたを見つめている。難しい記憶が、彼を今ここから引き離そうとしている。{/n}「ええ、もちろん、私たちは...ヌンキウスに行かなければなりません。彼を見つけて、私が始めたことを終わらせなければならない、そうでしょう？」
